50: 〉 You managed to meet all three of the
messiahs Stephen mentioned.
[->]〉 You should return to En no Ozuno's room,
where the three messiahs were sent.
[END]
100: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]It would appear all are now gathered.
[->]Only one remains−−the one whose soul 
is in Stephen's care.
[->]Come. Give me the Red and Blue Keys.
[END]
101: (Flynn) [7a 187]You've no doubt noticed already, 
but the enemies here are strong... 
Be careful.
[END]
102: (Demi−fiend) [7a 419]Hurry up. Don't make me wait.
[END]
103: (Aleph) [7a 417]I will pray for your safety and
success. Be careful.
[END]
104: 〉 You leave the room.
[END]
105: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]Hm? What are you doing? You haven't 
found the others, yet.
[->]Go and find the lost messiahs.
[END]
106: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]Oho, it seems you've met one of the 
three messiahs. I heard what happened 
from him.
[->]Now, go find the other two.
[END]
107: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]Hm, it would appear things are 
proceeding well... Only one messiah
remains to be found.
[->]Now, go find him. We shall await your
return.
[END]
108: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]Stephen awaits you. Head through the
east door.
[->]Exercise caution.
[END]
109: 〉 You hand En no Ozuno the Red Key 
and the Blue Key.
[END]
110: 〉 The two keys shine, burst, and
disappear in En no Ozuno's hand.
[END]
111: (En no Ozuno) [7a 409]The way is open... Go through the 
east door.
[->]Stephen should be waiting for you 
on the other side.
[->]Be prepared for anything.
[END]
